instruction: Discuss how this vulnerability can be mitigated or patched.
input: A cross-site scripting (xss) vulnerability exists in the login.cgi set_lang_CountryCode() functionality of Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to a disclosure of sensitive information. An attacker can make an unauthenticated HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.
output: To mitigate this XSS vulnerability, it is crucial to apply input validation and output encoding on user inputs within the 'set_lang_CountryCode()' function. Additionally, deploying an updated firmware that addresses this specific issue would effectively patch the vulnerability.
